task_completion.description: Verify that the Pittsburgh ground station was updated with the correct altitude and weather station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit ground station' dialog for Pittsburgh or a ground station list showing Altitude '230' and Weather Station 'KPIT'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Erie ground station was added with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog for Erie showing Latitude '42.1292' and Longitude '-80.0851' (or '80.0851' with West selected).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Erie ground station was added with the correct altitude and weather station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog for Erie showing Altitude '222' and Weather Station 'KEIE'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Harrisburg ground station was added with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog for Harrisburg showing Latitude '40.2732' and Longitude '-76.8867' (or '76.8867' with West selected).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Harrisburg ground station was added with the correct altitude and weather station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog for Harrisburg showing Altitude '102' and Weather Station 'KMDT'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the RACES module includes the required satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Configure Module' dialog for RACES or the main RACES module view showing 'AO-85' (or Fox-1A), 'ISS' (or ZARYA), and 'SO-50' in the list of tracked/selected satellites.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GPredict GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict application windows and dialogs being opened and edited, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'sed', 'echo', or 'nano' being used to edit files in the '.config/Gpredict/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are displayed within the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual evidence of ground stations and modules must be seen within the GPredict interface, not in a text editor or a separate document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pittsburgh correct parameters: Altitude 230m, WX KPIT. Erie correct parameters: Lat 42.1292, Lon -80.0851 (or 80.0851 W), Alt 222m, WX KEIE. Harrisburg correct parameters: Lat 40.2732, Lon -76.8867 (or 76.8867 W), Alt 102m, WX KMDT. RACES module must include satellites with NORAD IDs 25544 (ISS / ZARYA), 27607 (SO-50), and 40967 (AO-85 / Fox-1A).
